explanation: This video shows cosmetic/aesthetic medical training content related to facial procedures, not FLS (Fundamentals of Laparoscopic Surgery) tasks. The content includes classroom instruction, patient demonstrations for cosmetic procedures, and promotional material for FusionGT medical training company. No laparoscopic training equipment, trainers, or FLS task performance is visible.

frame_analyses.description: Classroom setting with medical professionals in scrubs around tables with training materials, instructor presenting at front
Live patient demonstration of cosmetic facial procedure with multiple practitioners
Interview setup with medical professional against branded backdrop discussing cosmetic procedures
